hooks.command: try { $p = ([Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json).prompt } catch { exit 0 }; if ($p -match '(?i)(review|revisi|revisa|audit|analiz|analys|analyz)') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'UserPromptSubmit'; additionalContext = 'A review may have been requested. If you produce a code/security/functionality review this turn, ALSO file it into the auto-memory file at C:\Users\Usuario\.claude\projects\c--Users-Usuario-Desktop-AtenttionApp\memory\project_review.md (append or update its summary and keep the MEMORY.md index line current). The full review may also live at repo-root review.md, but project_review.md must capture or point to it.' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
